reviews.review_description: I was only able to get a couple minutes into it before turning it off. Was hoping for a comparable experience to Thrill Of The Fight, but it fell really short. Main issue was the interplay between the user and the opponent. It felt clumsy. Punches seemed to not read correctly. Disappointed but hoping it gets cleaned up.

developer_response.body:
Hello friend DaveG-luck, thank you for your review, please we now update the app, please update in your oculus, we know you will have a great time and good experience now. please if you have suggestions let me read you 3dmundo.client@gmail.com.
Important: In the game when appears a rectangle on you right side, you can only block the opponent punches, you need to move back and dodge for a few seconds.

reviews.review_description: Love this kind of games, the sub game is fun and good exercise.

Great graphics , It's a little bit difficult, but this makes you exercise even more.
Some improvements are required, I hope it will be updated soon.
In general it's a  good game.

developer_response.body: Hello Oxem thank you for your review, we already submit a new update, please update the app.
